message:
test(ftui-extras): add test coverage for clipboard, terminal widget, and GPU modules

- clipboard.rs: 26 new tests (58→84) covering OSC 52 protocol, DCS passthrough,
  cut buffers, error types, auto-detection, and payload boundaries (bd-116xf)
- terminal/widget.rs: 27 new tests (18→45) covering cursor shapes via apply_cursor,
  visibility, scrollback rendering, area offset/clipping, cell attributes (bd-16xp5)
- visual_fx/gpu.rs: 27 new tests covering packed_to_vec4, div_ceil, GpuBall/
  GpuDisableReason structs, GpuBackend state machine, render path (bd-3ovam)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
